title: Functions and methods should not have identical implementations
description: Functions and methods should not have the same implementation across the codebase.
impact: Code duplication leads to increased maintenance effort and potential inconsistencies.
recommendation: Consider refactoring the code to reduce duplication.
why_is_this_an_issue: Code duplication leads to increased maintenance effort and potential inconsistencies.
how_to_fix: Refactor the code to reduce duplication.

metadata.title: Functions and methods should not have identical implementations
